title: Strike Team Delta
description:
Strike Team Delta is a 1-4 player online co-op zombie horror. Complete tasks and puzzles to restore the fate of humanity.Don't forget to wishlist!Are you good enough for the delta team?• Online Co-Op
Play with up to 4 friends and you all must work together to retrieve the objective and survive.

• Replayability
In Strike Team Delta, each playthrough is different, with random spawns ensuring you have a different experience every time.
Weapon CustomisationBuild your guns the way you want them!
Character CustomisationChoose what gear to wear into battle
Saving humanityNot only is your goal to survive, but you will also need to retrieve the objective you have been sent to getImmersive GameplayStrike Team Delta is powered by Unreal Engine 5 ensuring the highest quality graphics for the most immersive horror experience possible.

• Modding Support
It is one of the early plans to enable modding support for the community to build any epic mission they desire!

• Player Progression
You should see player progression to unlock attachments, player skins, and weapon skins soon

• Procedural animations
Procedural animations for reloads, firing, and grips are all coming very soon!

• More Maps & Missions
I will be adding a few more maps and missions to the base game before unleashing the modding community.
description_short: Strike Team Delta is a gripping first-person shooter set in a post-apocalyptic world. Battle hordes of undead, team up with friends, and reclaim our world. Survival is in your hands.
